member.name: T:DDG.IPlistElementOptions
member.summary: Interface for PlistElementOptions.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.PlistName
member.summary: Gets the name of the Plist.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.PlistObject
member.summary: Gets the Plist object.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.Find(System.String)
member.summary: Recursive find for PlistElementOptions.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.Dispose
member.summary: Cleans the PlistElementOptions instances for the specified session context.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.UpdateSinglePlistElementOption(System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}@)
member.summary: Updates a single Plist element option.
member.param: The key-value pair representing the option.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.Restore
member.summary: Restores the Plist element options.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistElementOptions.Resolve
member.summary: Resolves the Plist element options.

member.name: T:DDG.IPlistModifications
member.summary: Interface for pattern modification. Helper for Prime PatConfig.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistModifications.GetPlistElementOptions(Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Builds/Fetches plist element options object.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistModifications.GetPlistTreeInfo(Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds/Fetches plist tree information.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistModifications.Clean(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Removes tree node from concurrent data structure.
member.param: Plist name. If empty it will delete the entire tree.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistModifications.Clean(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Cleans the plist tree and plist options.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistModifications.RestorePlistElementOptions(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Restores plist element options.
member.param: Plist name. If empty it will delete the entire tree.

member.name: T:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo
member.summary: Represents a plist tree.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.PlistObject
member.summary: Gets the plist object.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.PlistName
member.summary: Gets the parent PlistName.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.Children
member.summary: Gets the plist children objects.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.Contents
member.summary: Gets the plist contents.

member.name: P:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.PatternOccurrences
member.summary: Gets the plist pattern occurrences in HW execution order.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.Find(System.String)
member.summary: Recursive find for PlistElementOptions.

member.name: M:DDG.IPlistTreeInfo.Dispose
member.summary: Clears the children and removes the instance from the Instances dictionary.

member.name: T:DDG.PlistElementOptions
member.summary: Defines a plist tree.

member.name: F:DDG.PlistElementOptions.Instances
member.summary: Stores all plist element options instances.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.#ctor(Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes an instance of the class.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementOptions.Console
member.summary: Gets a variable holding Prime.Services.ConsoleService or null depending on the current instances LogLevel.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementOptions.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets a variable containing the ISessionContextProviderContainer for this instance.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementOptions.ElementOptionsDirtyFlag
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether plist element options are dirty.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementOptions.RestoreElementsOptions
member.summary: Gets the element options to restore.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.CreateInstance(Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the class if it doesn't already exist in the container.
member.returns: The created or existing instance of .

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.Clean(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Cleans the PlistElementOptions instances for the specified session context.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Cleans the PlistElementOptions instances for the specified session context without restoring to the original state.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.Restore(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Restores the PlistElementOptions instances for the specified session context.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistElementOptions.RestorePlistElementOptions
member.summary: Restores plist element options.

member.name: T:DDG.PlistModifications
member.summary: Singleton for PatternModifications service.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistModifications.Service
member.summary: Gets or sets Dlvr service implementation.

member.name: T:DDG.PlistTreeInfo
member.summary: Defines a plist tree.

member.name: F:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.Instances
member.summary: Stores all instances of PlistTreeImmutable.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes an instance of the class.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.Console
member.summary: Gets a variable holding Prime.Services.ConsoleService or null depending on the current instances LogLevel.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets a variable containing the ISessionContextProviderContainer for this instance.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.Dispose
member.summary: Clears the children and removes the instance from the Instances dictionary.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.CreateInstance(Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a PlistTreeImmutable instance.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistTreeInfo.Clean(System.String)
member.summary: Cleans the PlistTreeImmutable instances.
member.param: Plist name to clean. If null or empty, clears all instances.
